tasks.title: Pipeline foundation: PipelineState TypedDict + retrieval and generation nodes
acceptance_criteria: harness/chains/pipeline_state.py created with PipelineState TypedDict and make_initial_state()
harness/chains/nodes/__init__.py created
harness/chains/nodes/retrieval.py: retrieval_node(state, retriever) returns {docs: [...]}
harness/chains/nodes/generation.py: generation_node(state, llm, strategy) picks summary if non-empty, else docs
tests/test_pipeline_nodes.py with mock retriever and mock LLM passes

tasks.title: Extract grade + rewrite nodes from crag.py into nodes/
acceptance_criteria: harness/chains/nodes/grade.py: build_grade_node(llm) factory callable standalone
harness/chains/nodes/rewrite.py: build_rewrite_node(llm) factory callable standalone
crag.py updated to import from nodes/ (no behaviour change)
cycle renamed to rewrite_cycle in crag.py; wrapper output still has correction_cycles key
pytest tests/test_langchain_chains.py::TestCRAG — all tests still pass

tasks.title: Summarization node + summarize_rag strategy
acceptance_criteria: harness/chains/nodes/summarization.py: build_summarization_node(llm) callable
harness/prompts/system_summarize.md created (instructs to be concise, preserve qa_id citations)
summarize_rag registered in CHAIN_REGISTRY
get_chain('summarize_rag', ...).invoke({'question': '...'}) returns answer_text
Test: mock LLM; verify state['summary'] populated; generation uses summary not raw docs

tasks.title: build_pipeline() factory + PipelineConfig dataclass
acceptance_criteria: harness/chains/pipeline.py: PipelineConfig dataclass + build_pipeline() function
build_pipeline() assembles StateGraph from PipelineConfig flags
crag_summarize strategy registered (retrieve → grade ⇄ rewrite → summarize → generate)
Output dict has: answer_text, docs, cited_qa_ids, prompt_strategy (+ optional summary, review_score)
Existing TestChainRegistry, TestCRAG, TestBuildRagChain all still pass
Tests for: linear path, grade-rewrite loop bounded by max_rewrite_cycles, summarization branch

tasks.title: Review node + crag_review and react_review strategies
acceptance_criteria: harness/chains/nodes/review.py: build_review_node(llm, threshold) callable
review_node calls Judge.faithfulness; converts 1-5 score to [0,1]
route_after_review: loops back to generate if score < threshold AND review_cycle < max_review_cycles
crag_review strategy: retrieve → grade ⇄ rewrite → generate → review ⇄ revise
react_review strategy: react subgraph → extract → review → [revise]
Test: always-low-judge mock never exceeds max_review_cycles iterations
Existing TestEvaluators tests unaffected

tasks.title: Per-step RLHF feedback: node-level Phoenix annotation + fewshot injection
acceptance_criteria: rating.py node_span_ids parameter annotates named child spans in Phoenix
get_fewshot_context(query_vec, cache, node_name='grade') returns grade-specific examples
build_pipeline() accepts fewshot_context_by_node: dict[str, str]
Backward compat: existing get_fewshot_context() calls without node_name still work
Tests use mock Phoenix client; no live Phoenix server required

tasks.title: LangGraph MemorySaver for interactive sessions in app.py
acceptance_criteria: app.py creates a session_id (uuid4) at startup and prints it
Pipeline compiled with MemorySaver() checkpointer in interactive mode
config={'configurable': {'thread_id': session_id}} passed in interactive mode
run_eval.py and run_langsmith_eval.py invoke without thread_id (stateless, no checkpointing)
Unit test: two sequential graph.invoke() calls with same thread_id share state

tasks.title: (Optional) Clean break: migrate simple_rag_* to build_pipeline()
acceptance_criteria: simple_rag_zero/few/cot in CHAIN_REGISTRY use build_pipeline(PipelineConfig(...))
simple_rag.py kept as utility module (extract_answer, format_docs still importable)
TestBuildRagChain tests migrated to test build_pipeline() directly
simple_rag_* strategies produce named node spans in LangSmith (retrieve/generate)
All existing tests pass with updated imports
